privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating a PsychoPy experiment and a corresponding conditions CSV file. The exact expected CSV file path is /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/phrases.csv and the experiment file must be saved to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/transcription_task.psyexp. The target phrases required in the conditions file must exactly match: 'my watch fell in the water', 'prevailing wind from the east', 'never too rich and never too thin', 'breathing is difficult', and 'i can see the rings on saturn', which are a standard subset of the MacKenzie and Soukoreff phrase set for HCI evaluation. These values were explicitly confirmed by inspecting the verifier logic.
